published_prior_art.cite: FanYu2012/FanPark2010: cellwise Makarov-style bounds from identified marginals

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_dist_synth_control_v1: marginal-to-treatment-effect transport LP width, but non-staggered

published_prior_art.cite: FirpoRidder2019: multi-point treatment-effect CDF/functionals bounds show pointwise Makarov regions are not uniformly sharp
CallawayLi2019/LiLin2024: QTT point identification under copula restrictions

structure_flags.label: Bibliography
structure_flags.one_line: FirpoRidder2019 is assigned to Firpo and Ridder in §13 but the listed title/venue/pages correspond to a different JBES article; the real Firpo-Ridder 2019 comparator is Journal of Econometrics 213(1):210-234.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: Flagship prior-art comparisons cite FanYu2012, FanPark2010, and LiLin2024 by bibkey only, with no section/equation/page anchor tying the claimed staggered LP gap to the precise published gap.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: FirpoRidder2019 is closer than the §8 block admits because it explicitly studies finite-point treatment-effect CDF/functionals bounds beyond pointwise Makarov envelopes.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The negative kernel refutes independent cellwise staggered QTT pasting, but does not name a published staggered-QTT estimator or workflow that actually reports that product bound.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 3
novelty_flags.one_line: The CallawayLi2019/LiLin2024 collapse comparison is bare-bibkey; no location-level anchor is given for the exact copula-stability result being recovered.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The proposed sign-changing support-function correction conflicts with W_stag(a;P)=h_prod(a;P)-h_stag(a;P)>=0 for every fixed direction because R_stag(P) is defined as a subset of the product relaxation.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 3
soundness_flags.one_line: The claimed corollary W_stag(a;P)=0 under a Callaway-Li copula does not follow: h_prod still optimizes over unrestricted cellwise couplings, so it need not equal the singleton copula-stable h_stag.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: R_stag(P) is described only by prose rank-path and risk-set mixture equations; the LP variables and linear constraints are not pinned enough for a sharp identified-set statement.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Redefine the diagnostic so the collapse corner compares the width of R_stag itself, not h_prod-h_stag, or explicitly restrict h_prod by the same copula/timing-homogeneity constraints.
Replace the sign-changing W_stag claim with a signed, separately defined endpoint-difference object, or drop the sign-reversal clause and prove only strict non-rectangular tightening.
Add location-level anchors for LiLin2024, CallawayLi2019, FanYu2012, and FirpoRidder2019, and fix the FirpoRidder/Russell bibliography collision.
Name a published staggered-QTT or applied workflow that uses independent cellwise intervals, or recast Conjecture 2 as a positive sharp-bound theorem rather than a refutation of an unnamed shortcut.

recommended_next_step: Redraft the kernel around a coherent width/collapse diagnostic before sending any Stage 0 formalization work downstream.
